name: Distributed Task Scheduler
description: A fault-tolerant distributed task scheduling system supporting cron expressions, DAG workflows, and automatic failover. Handles 10K+ tasks/min in production.

name: API Gateway
description: High-performance API gateway with rate limiting, circuit breaking, and dynamic routing. Built as a lightweight alternative for internal microservices.

name: Log Aggregation Pipeline
description: Real-time log collection and analysis pipeline processing 500GB+/day. Features structured logging, full-text search, and alerting rules.
